zh.lifeSummary: 當Widekind Ier von Schwalenberg於大約1082年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 賀特馬利姆爾斯特時，他的父親Hermann von Schwalenberg17歲，母親Frederuna50歲。他於1110年與Lutrud von Itter在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 奧斯納布呂克格奧爾斯馬利賀特額澤德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1137年6月11日享年56歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 賀特馬利姆爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Widekind Ier von Schwalenberg于大约1082年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 賀特馬利姆爾斯特时，他的父亲Hermann von Schwalenberg17岁，母亲Frederuna50岁。他于1110年与Lutrud von Itter在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 奧斯納布呂克格奧爾斯馬利賀特額澤德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1137年6月11日享年56岁，埋葬在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 賀特馬利姆爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Schwalenberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Schwalenberg, a place near Höxter.

nameMeanings.name: Widekind
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wid(u) ‘wood, forest’ + kind ‘child’. The name became famous as that of a Duke of Lower Saxony who was an opponent of Charlemagne, and was consequently popular in northern Germany as a personal name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Wedding
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Wedding or Weddingen.
variant of Weddig, a short form of Wedekind .

variants.name: Wege
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Hans, Juergen, Jutta, Volker.
topographic name from Middle High German wēc ‘path, street’, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word.

variants.name: Wedeking
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Horst.

variants.name: Wettig
meanings: German: derivative of Wetting, a patronymic (ending in -ing) from personal names formed with wid(u) ‘wood, forest’ as the first element, for instance Wedekind .

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Widekind Ier von Schwalenberg was born about 1082, in Marienmünster, Höxter, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, his father, Hermann von Schwalenberg, was 17 and his mother, Frederuna, was 50. He married Lutrud von Itter in 1110, in Oesede, Georgsmarienhütte, Osnabrück, Lower Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 11 June 1137, at the age of 56, and was buried in Marienmünster, Höxter, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Widekind Ier von Schwalenberg est né environ 1082, à Marienmünster, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Hermann von Schwalenberg, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Frederuna, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Lutrud von Itter en 1110, à Oesede, Georgsmarienhütte, Landkreis Osnabrück, Niedersachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 11 juin 1137, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Marienmünster, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Widekind Ier von Schwalenberg um 1082 in Marienmünster, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hermann von Schwalenberg 17 und seine Mutter Frederuna 50. Er hat 1110 in Oesede, Georgsmarienhütte, Landkreis Osnabrück, Niedersachsen, Deutschland Lutrud von Itter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Juni 1137 im Alter von 56 Jahren und wurde in Marienmünster, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Widekind Ier von Schwalenberg è nato il circa 1082 nel Marienmünster, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, il suo padre, Hermann von Schwalenberg, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Frederuna, aveva 50 anni. Lui sposato Lutrud von Itter nel 1110, nel Oesede, Georgsmarienhütte, Landkreis Osnabrück, Niedersachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 giugno 1137, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Marienmünster, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Widekind Ier von Schwalenbergが約1082年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス hoクスターマリーンムuンスターで生まれた時，父Hermann von Schwalenbergは17歳，母Frederunaは50歳であった。1110年にドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス オスナブルuックジョーグスマリーンhuットオエセドでLutrud von Itterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1137年6月11日に56歳で死去し，ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス hoクスターマリーンムuンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Widekind Ier von Schwalenberg(이)가 대략 1082년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 ho스터 마앵u스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hermann von Schwalenberg(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Frederuna(은)는 50세였다. 그는 1110년 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 오스나브uc크 조그스마앵hu트 세드에서 Lutrud von Itter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1137년 6월 11일 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 ho스터 마앵u스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Widekind Ier von Schwalenberg nasceu aproximadamente 1082, em Marienmünster, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Hermann von Schwalenberg, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Frederuna, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Lutrud von Itter em 1110, em Oesede, Georgsmarienhütte, Landkreis Osnabrück, Niedersachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de junho de 1137, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Marienmünster, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Widekind Ier von Schwalenberg родился около 1082 г. в местности мариенмuнстир, крис хoкстир, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, его отцу по имени Hermann von Schwalenberg было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Frederuna, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Lutrud von Itter в 1110 г. в местности оесед, джеоргсмариенuтт, ландкрис оснабрuкк, ниедирсачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 11 июня 1137 г. в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности мариенмuнстир, крис хoкстир, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Widekind Ier von Schwalenberg nació aproximadamente 1082, en Marienmünster, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Hermann von Schwalenberg, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Frederuna, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Lutrud von Itter en 1110, en Oesede, Georgsmarienhütte, Landkreis Osnabrück, Niedersachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de junio de 1137, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Marienmünster, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
